# GSAP 3.15.0 Standard License Note

- Package: `gsap@3.15.0`
- Local file covered: `web/static/vendor/gsap-3.15.0/gsap.min.js`
- Source package: https://registry.npmjs.org/gsap/-/gsap-3.15.0.tgz
- Homepage: https://gsap.com
- Repository: https://github.com/greensock/GSAP
- Package license field: Standard 'no charge' license: https://gsap.com/standard-license.
- Official license page checked: https://gsap.com/standard-license
- Effective date listed by official page: April 30, 2025
- Last modified date listed by official page: May 30, 2025
- Official page copyright line: Copyright (c) 2025, Webflow.
- Package file header copyright line: Copyright 2026, GreenSock. All rights reserved.

The full GSAP standard license text is not copied into this repository note. The vendored
`gsap.min.js` file contains its own package header with the license URL. Future GSAP updates must
use a new versioned directory and refresh this note plus `web/static/vendor/VENDOR_NOTES.md`.
